overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an industrial district of Night City during golden hour. The character moves from a graffiti-covered alley through industrial streets with overhead pipelines, up a hill past a massive billboard, and across an intersection with factory buildings in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered industrial alley with abandoned vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past industrial warehouses and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building covered in colorful graffiti murals
derelict blue vehicle parked against the warehouse wall with debris around it
tall gray concrete wall with industrial textures and shadows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial alley with a large graffiti-covered warehouse wall on the left and an abandoned blue car. The character walks forward along the concrete sidewalk, passing dry vegetation and industrial debris, with the sun casting long shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with overhead pipeline bridges

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider industrial street with visible overhead pipelines and power infrastructure
slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial corridor with power lines and pipelines overhead, approaching distant figures

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking on the sidewalk ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive industrial pipeline bridge spanning across the street overhead
tall metal lattice tower with multiple power lines extending across the scene
tall factory chimneys emitting steam visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider industrial street with massive overhead pipeline structures spanning across the road. Electrical transmission towers and distant factory chimneys become visible against the blue sky. A pedestrian can be seen walking in the distance as the character moves through this industrial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill sidewalk alongside road with massive billboard

events.description: begins ascending the inclined sidewalk alongside the busy road
large triangular billboard temporarily blocks the sun creating lens flare effect

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on the sidewalk approaching a large triangular billboard structure with the sun ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the billboard structure

entered.detail: massive three-sided billboard tower with orange support pillars silhouetted against the sun
tall concrete wall with graffiti running alongside the elevated sidewalk
single palm tree visible against the sky near the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a sloping sidewalk alongside a busy road, approaching a massive triangular billboard that stands silhouetted against the bright sun. A pedestrian walks ahead on the path, and vehicles pass by on the adjacent street. The concrete retaining wall on the right is covered in graffiti.

events.description: traffic light changes from green to red as the character approaches the intersection
turns left to cross the intersection at the crosswalk
crosses the street while a yellow van passes through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, waiting for traffic light, then crossing the street while observing surroundings

notable_agents.action: yellow van driving through the intersection from right to left
person crossing the street from left to right in the opposite direction

entered.detail: multi-story industrial building with blue lower facade and dark upper windows
horizontal traffic light pole with red and green signals visible
large industrial facility with multiple chimneys and steam emissions

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide industrial intersection with a distinctive blue building and massive factory chimneys in the background. After waiting for the traffic light, the character crosses the asphalt crosswalk while a yellow van passes by and another pedestrian crosses in the opposite direction. The scene ends with a view of the expansive industrial complex ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial alleyway into a sprawling urban intersection under the glow of the golden hour. It begins by tracking a character past a graffiti-covered warehouse wall and an abandoned blue car, moving through a narrow corridor of concrete and industrial debris. As the path opens, the scene expands into a wider street dominated by massive overhead pipelines and distant factory chimneys silhouetted against a blue sky. The camera then ascends a sloping sidewalk alongside a busy road, passing a graffiti-strewn retaining wall before approaching a towering triangular billboard backlit by the bright sun. Finally, the movement leads into a wide industrial intersection where the character crosses an asphalt crosswalk past a yellow van, revealing an expansive complex of blue buildings and factory stacks in the distance.
